generated_from_state_hash: main@b719386a (T13+T19 wire-in + Lane 12-v2 + T20+T22 + Catalog #124 grammar gate + probe-disambiguator T8-alone verdict)
doc: One row per (track, solver_component) pair. Columns: wired/orphan/out_of_scope + rationale. Solver components inventoried from CLAUDE.md 'Meta-Lagrangian/Pareto solver' non-negotiable + repo grep.

tracks.kind: Riemannian distance closed-form on mask probability simplex; convex envelope of IoU gradient
tracks.landed_commit_ref: pre-existing (Shannon floor module landed prior; Fisher-Rao surrogate keyed off it)

tracks.kind: Wasserstein-2 mask surrogate via Sinkhorn (entropic OT)
Fridrich √n undetectable embedding bound; Berger 1971 §4.5 Gauss-Markov rate floor
Boyd 2011 §3.4.1 / He-Yang 2000 adaptive penalty step extracted as standalone helper
NeRV-class renderer with int8+fp16-scale weight quant + uint8-delta-split latent table
tracks.landed_commit_ref: cda997d7 (Phase A: design + module + inflate + 39 tests)

tracks.module: (latent-aligned 178,262 B archive at 0.19284 [contest-CPU GHA Linux x86_64]; sha 87ec7ca5...492b5)
tracks.kind: Empirical anchor / substrate signal; no code module — referenced by predictor + posterior layers

solver_components.consumes: per-channel score sensitivity Tensor[O]; certified maps + pair manifests
(archive_bytes, rel_err_pct, n_layers) candidate tuples; closed-form distortion proxy + Lagrangian penalties
stream proximal codecs; budget; adaptive-ρ schedule
candidate techniques + plan rows; emits ranked dispatch queue
[contest-CUDA] / [contest-CPU GHA] anchors; updates per-architecture-class drift profile (R_pose, R_seg, gap)
auxiliary scorer fixtures for Tishby IB Lagrangian
sketched field-equation atoms; emits constraint-feasibility plans

matrix.rationale: T7 Riemannian distance is consumed by score_geometry_shannon_floor + ib_lagrangian_aux_scorer but NOT registered as a sensitivity-vector source for the per-channel allocator. Wire-in: register `tac.score_geometry.fisher_rao_per_channel_sensitivity()` as a SensitivityKind.

MetaLagrangianSearch uses a generic distortion_proxy callable; T7 should appear as a refinement of `seg` proxy. Wire-in: add optional `t7_fisher_rao_seg_overlay` to LagrangianConstraints with default off (warn-once if used).
ADMM doesn't currently know about T7. Out-of-scope unless T7 enters as a stream proximal codec.

Pareto axes are (rate, seg, pose); T7 lives inside the seg axis. Wire-in: tag seg-component rows with `seg_geometry_form: 'fisher_rao' | 'argmax_disagreement'` so Pareto frontier is regime-conditional.
Plan rows have no `seg_loss_geometry` field. Wire-in: catalog field + plan-row schema bump.
No per-architecture-class T7 prior. Wire-in: posterior tracks `t7_seg_correction_factor` per architecture class.
score_geometry_shannon_floor consumed; T7 surrogate available.
Field-equation atoms have no T7 entry. Wire-in: register T7 as a closed-form atom (free; no GPU required).
Sinkhorn cost matrix is per-pixel; not aggregated to per-channel. Wire-in deferred (probe disambiguator verdict prefers T8-alone for Phase 1; sensitivity-map use is Phase 2).
Same as T7. Wire-in: optional `t8_sinkhorn_w2_seg_overlay` with same warn-once default.
Out-of-scope (loss surrogate, not a codec stream).
